history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Two people are posed closely together in a studio-style portrait, with one person in a dark red embroidered dress and the other in stylized medieval-style clothing.

Main Subject:
A young adult man stands slightly behind and to the right of a young adult woman, holding the woman close with one arm around her upper body. The man has light skin, medium-length wavy dark brown hair, eyes that appear partly closed or relaxed, and he faces downward toward her. The woman has light skin, long wavy blonde hair, and she faces the camera with a calm, neutral expression.

Setting:
The background is a plain, smooth gray studio backdrop. The lighting is soft and even, with gentle shadows that highlight the clothing textures.

Visual Details:
The woman wears a long-sleeved, dark red outfit with dense decorative embroidery and ornate patterns. The sleeves and upper portion of the dress include gold-toned floral and decorative motifs, and the fabric has a rich, textured look. She stands in a slight angle toward the camera, shoulders relaxed, her head turned toward the lens.  
The man wears a costume with a structured, armored appearance. His top is brown with dark accents and lighter trim, with visible paneling and decorative motifs across the chest and shoulder area. He also wears a large, off-white/cream shoulder piece and cape-like fabric draped around him. His forearm and sleeve areas include dark brown sections and patterned shapes. His lower clothing and cape fabric hang down, creating a vertical layered look behind the woman. The overall composition is centered on the pair, shot from about chest-to-head height in a vertical frame.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a couple posed together in a studio portrait against a plain gray background. One person wears an embroidered red dress, while the other wears stylized armored, medieval-style costume elements.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

There is no visible text in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text detected]

# Notes

- The image appears to be a photo of people in costume; no UI labels, captions, or readable text are present.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young, fair-skinned man with brown hair and a gentle expression is embracing a young woman with blonde, braided hair and light makeup. The woman is leaning her head on the man's shoulder, her eyes open and looking towards the viewer with a soft gaze. She is wearing an ornate, long-sleeved red gown with intricate gold embroidery featuring floral and vine patterns, and a high neckline. The man is dressed in elaborate, fantasy-style armor. His armor is predominantly a light tan color, with layered, scale-like pauldrons and a decorative breastplate adorned with white, swirling patterns. He wears leather gauntlets and a cream-colored cape drapes over his shoulder. A decorative sword hilt, with a circular emblem and diamond patterns, is visible at his hip. The background is a plain, neutral grey, providing a stark contrast to the vibrant colors and detailed textures of the subjects. The lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting the subjects and creating a romantic, almost regal, mood. The overall color palette is rich, with the deep red of the woman's dress and the metallic tones of the man's armor being prominent. The style evokes a medieval or fantasy setting, perhaps from a historical drama or epic tale.
